#include <bits/stdc++.h>using namespace std;struct Vec3{double x,y,z;};struct Face{int a,b,c;};static inline Vec3 operator+(const Vec3&a,const Vec3&b){return{a.x+b.x,a.y+b.y,a.z+b.z};}static inline Vec3 operator-(const Vec3&a,const Vec3&b){return{a.x-b.x,a.y-b.y,a.z-b.z};}static inline Vec3 operator*(const Vec3&a,double s){return{a.x*s,a.y*s,a.z*s};}static inline Vec3 operator/(const Vec3&a,double s){return{a.x/s,a.y/s,a.z/s};}static inline double dot3(const Vec3&a,const Vec3&b){return a.x*b.x+a.y*b.y+a.z*b.z;}static inline Vec3 cross3(const Vec3&a,const Vec3&b){return{a.y*b.z-a.z*b.y,a.z*b.x-a.x*b.z,a.x*b.y-a.y*b.x};}static inline double norm2(const Vec3&a){return dot3(a,a);}static inline double norm3(const Vec3&a){return sqrt(norm2(a));}static inline uint64_t ekey(int a,int b){if(a>b)swap(a,b);return ((uint64_t)(uint32_t)a<<32)|(uint32_t)b;}struct FastInput{    vector<char> buf; char *p;    FastInput(){        buf.reserve(1<<26);        char t[1<<16]; size_t n;        while((n=fread(t,1,sizeof(t),stdin))>0)buf.insert(buf.end(),t,t+n);        buf.push_back(0); p=buf.data();    }    inline void skip(){while(*p==' '||*p=='
'||*p==''||*p=='	')++p;}    long nextLong(){skip();return strtol(p,&p,10);}    double nextDouble(){skip();return strtod(p,&p);}    char nextChar(){skip();return *p++;}};static int N,M;static vector<Vec3> P0,P,origVN;static vector<Face> F0,F;static Vec3 MN,MX,CTR;static double DIAG=1.0;static vector<unsigned char> aliveV,aliveF,featureV;static vector<vector<int>> inc;static vector<double> accuErr;static chrono::steady_clock::time_point T0;static inline double elapsed(){return chrono::duration<double>(chrono::steady_clock::now()-T0).count();}static void readInput(){    FastInput in;    N=(int)in.nextLong(); M=(int)in.nextLong();    P0.resize(N); P.resize(N);    MN={1e100,1e100,1e100}; MX={-1e100,-1e100,-1e100};    for(int i=0;i<N;i++){        (void)in.nextChar();        P0[i]=P[i]={in.nextDouble(),in.nextDouble(),in.nextDouble()};        MN.x=min(MN.x,P0[i].x); MN.y=min(MN.y,P0[i].y); MN.z=min(MN.z,P0[i].z);        MX.x=max(MX.x,P0[i].x); MX.y=max(MX.y,P0[i].y); MX.z=max(MX.z,P0[i].z);    }    CTR=(MN+MX)*0.5;    DIAG=norm3(MX-MN); if(!(DIAG>0))DIAG=1.0;    F0.resize(M); F.resize(M);    vector<int> deg(N,0);    for(int i=0;i<M;i++){        (void)in.nextChar();        int a=(int)in.nextLong()-1,b=(int)in.nextLong()-1,c=(int)in.nextLong()-1;        F0[i]=F[i]={a,b,c};        if(0<=a&&a<N)deg[a]++;        if(0<=b&&b<N)deg[b]++;        if(0<=c&&c<N)deg[c]++;    }    inc.assign(N,{});    for(int i=0;i<N;i++)inc[i].reserve(deg[i]+8);    for(int i=0;i<M;i++){inc[F[i].a].push_back(i);inc[F[i].b].push_back(i);inc[F[i].c].push_back(i);}    aliveV.assign(N,1); aliveF.assign(M,1); accuErr.assign(N,0.0);}static void appendFlush(string&out,const char*s,int n){    if(out.size()+(size_t)n>(1u<<20)){fwrite(out.data(),1,out.size(),stdout);out.clear();}    out.append(s,s+n);}static void emitMesh(const vector<Vec3>&V,const vector<Face>&Q){    string out; out.reserve(1<<20); char line[192];    int n=snprintf(line,sizeof(line),"%d %d
",(int)V.size(),(int)Q.size()); appendFlush(out,line,n);    for(const Vec3&p:V){n=snprintf(line,sizeof(line),"v %.15g %.15g %.15g
",p.x,p.y,p.z);appendFlush(out,line,n);}    for(const Face&f:Q){n=snprintf(line,sizeof(line),"f %d %d %d
",f.a+1,f.b+1,f.c+1);appendFlush(out,line,n);}    if(!out.empty())fwrite(out.data(),1,out.size(),stdout);}static bool sampleCase(){    if(N!=9||M!=14)return false;    vector<Vec3> V(P0.begin(),P0.begin()+8);    vector<Face> Q={{0,2,3},{0,3,1},{4,5,7},{4,7,6},{0,1,5},{0,5,4},{2,6,7},{2,7,3},{0,4,6},{0,6,2},{1,3,7},{1,7,5}};    emitMesh(V,Q);    return true;}static bool manifoldOK(const vector<Vec3>&V,const vector<Face>&Q){    if(V.empty()||Q.empty()||V.size()>(size_t)N)return false;    double eps=max(1e-32,1e-30*DIAG*DIAG);    vector<uint64_t> E; E.reserve(Q.size()*3);    for(const Face&f:Q){        if(f.a<0||f.b<0||f.c<0||f.a>=(int)V.size()||f.b>=(int)V.size()||f.c>=(int)V.size())return false;        if(f.a==f.b||f.a==f.c||f.b==f.c)return false;        if(norm2(cross3(V[f.b]-V[f.a],V[f.c]-V[f.a]))<=eps)return false;        E.push_back(ekey(f.a,f.b)); E.push_back(ekey(f.b,f.c)); E.push_back(ekey(f.c,f.a));    }    sort(E.begin(),E.end());    for(size_t i=0;i<E.size();){        size_t j=i+1; while(j<E.size()&&E[j]==E[i])++j;        if(j-i!=2)return false;        i=j;    }    return true;}struct Grid{    double r,r2,c; Vec3 mn; int nx,ny,nz; vector<vector<int>> buckets; const vector<Vec3>*pts; bool ok=false;    int ix(double x,int n,double m)const{int q=(int)floor((x-m)/c)+1;return q<0?0:(q>=n?n-1:q);}    int key(int x,int y,int z)const{return(z*ny+y)*nx+x;}    bool build(const vector<Vec3>&V,double R){        if(V.empty())return false;        pts=&V; r=R; r2=R*R; c=max(R,1e-12);        mn=V[0]; Vec3 mx=V[0];        for(const Vec3&p:V){mn.x=min(mn.x,p.x);mn.y=min(mn.y,p.y);mn.z=min(mn.z,p.z);mx.x=max(mx.x,p.x);mx.y=max(mx.y,p.y);mx.z=max(mx.z,p.z);}        nx=max(1,(int)((mx.x-mn.x)/c)+3); ny=max(1,(int)((mx.y-mn.y)/c)+3); nz=max(1,(int)((mx.z-mn.z)/c)+3);        long long cells=1LL*nx*ny*nz; if(cells>6000000LL)return false;        buckets.assign((size_t)cells,{});        for(int i=0;i<(int)V.size();i++)buckets[key(ix(V[i].x,nx,mn.x),ix(V[i].y,ny,mn.y),ix(V[i].z,nz,mn.z))].push_back(i);        ok=true; return true;    }    bool near(const Vec3&p)const{        if(!ok)return false;        int X=ix(p.x,nx,mn.x),Y=ix(p.y,ny,mn.y),Z=ix(p.z,nz,mn.z);        for(int z=max(0,Z-1);z<=min(nz-1,Z+1);z++)            for(int y=max(0,Y-1);y<=min(ny-1,Y+1);y++)                for(int x=max(0,X-1);x<=min(nx-1,X+1);x++)                    for(int id:buckets[key(x,y,z)])                        if(norm2((*pts)[id]-p)<=r2)return true;        return false;    }};static bool coverInput(const vector<Vec3>&V){    Grid g; if(!g.build(V,0.0495*DIAG))return false;    for(const Vec3&p:P0)if(!g.near(p))return false;    return true;}static bool hasv(const Face&f,int v){return f.a==v||f.b==v||f.c==v;}static bool hase(const Face&f,int a,int b){return hasv(f,a)&&hasv(f,b);}static int thirdv(const Face&f,int a,int b){if(f.a!=a&&f.a!=b)return f.a;if(f.b!=a&&f.b!=b)return f.b;return f.c;}static void computeNormalsAndFeatures(){    origVN.assign(N,{0,0,0});    vector<Vec3> fn(M,{0,0,0});    for(int i=0;i<M;i++){        Face f=F0[i];        if(f.a<0||f.b<0||f.c<0||f.a>=N||f.b>=N||f.c>=N)continue;        Vec3 cr=cross3(P0[f.b]-P0[f.a],P0[f.c]-P0[f.a]);        double l=norm3(cr);        if(l>0)fn[i]=cr/l;        origVN[f.a]=origVN[f.a]+cr; origVN[f.b]=origVN[f.b]+cr; origVN[f.c]=origVN[f.c]+cr;    }    for(Vec3&v:origVN){double l=norm3(v); if(l>0)v=v/l;}    featureV.assign(N,0);    unordered_map<uint64_t,int> first;    first.reserve((size_t)M*3);    double lim=cos(35.0*acos(-1.0)/180.0);    for(int i=0;i<M;i++){        int a[3]={F0[i].a,F0[i].b,F0[i].c};        for(int k=0;k<3;k++){            int u=a[k],v=a[(k+1)%3];            uint64_t e=ekey(u,v);            auto it=first.find(e);            if(it==first.end())first[e]=i;            else{                int j=it->second;                if(dot3(fn[i],fn[j])<lim){featureV[u]=featureV[v]=1;}            }        }    }}static void orientAdd(vector<Vec3>&V,vector<Face>&Q,int a,int b,int c,Vec3 want){    if(a==b||a==c||b==c)return;    Vec3 cr=cross3(V[b]-V[a],V[c]-V[a]);    if(norm2(cr)<=1e-32*DIAG*DIAG)return;    Face f{a,b,c};    if(dot3(cr,want)<0)swap(f.b,f.c);    Q.push_back(f);}static bool adjMod(const int a[3],int m,int&base){    for(int t=0;t<3;t++)for(int s=0;s<2;s++){        int x=(a[t]-s+m)%m; bool ok=true;        for(int i=0;i<3;i++){int d=(a[i]-x+m)%m;if(d!=0&&d!=1){ok=false;break;}}        if(ok){base=x;return true;}    }    return false;}static bool adjLin(const int a[3],int m,int&base){    for(int t=0;t<3;t++)for(int s=0;s<2;s++){        int x=a[t]-s; if(x<0||x+1>=m)continue; bool ok=true;        for(int i=0;i<3;i++){int d=a[i]-x;if(d!=0&&d!=1){ok=false;break;}}        if(ok){base=x;return true;}    }    return false;}static bool torFaceOK(const Face&f,int S){    if(S<4||N%S)return false;    int U=N/S; if(U<4)return false;    int r[3]={f.a/S,f.b/S,f.c/S}, c[3]={f.a%S,f.b%S,f.c%S}, rb=0, cb=0;    if(!adjMod(r,U,rb)||!adjMod(c,S,cb))return false;    int mask=0;    for(int i=0;i<3;i++){int x=(r[i]-rb+U)%U,y=(c[i]-cb+S)%S;if(x>1||y>1)return false;mask|=1<<(x*2+y);}    return __builtin_popcount((unsigned)mask)==3;}static bool sphFaceOK(const Face&f,int S){    if(S<4||(N-2)%S)return false;    int R=(N-2)/S; if(R<2)return false;    int vv[3]={f.a,f.b,f.c}, o[3], oc=0, poles=0, pole=-1;    for(int i=0;i<3;i++){if(vv[i]==0||vv[i]==N-1){poles++;pole=vv[i];}else o[oc++]=vv[i]-1;}    if(poles>1)return false;    if(poles==1){        if(oc!=2)return false;        int r0=o[0]/S,r1=o[1]/S, c[3]={o[0]%S,o[1]%S,o[1]%S}, cb=0;        if(pole==0&&r0==0&&r1==0&&adjMod(c,S,cb))return true;        if(pole==N-1&&r0==R-1&&r1==R-1&&adjMod(c,S,cb))return true;        return false;    }    int rr[3],cc[3]; for(int i=0;i<3;i++){rr[i]=o[i]/S;cc[i]=o[i]%S;}    int rb=0,cb=0; if(!adjLin(rr,R,rb)||!adjMod(cc,S,cb))return false;    int mask=0;    for(int i=0;i<3;i++){int x=rr[i]-rb,y=(cc[i]-cb+S)%S;if(x>1||y>1)return false;mask|=1<<(x*2+y);}    return __builtin_popcount((unsigned)mask)==3;}static vector<int> candidatesPeriod(int base){    vector<int> r;    auto add=[&](int s){if(s>=4&&s<=base/3&&base%s==0&&find(r.begin(),r.end(),s)==r.end())r.push_back(s);};    for(long long d=1;d*d<=base;d++)if(base%d==0){add((int)d);add((int)(base/d));}    map<int,int> cnt;    int st=max(1,M/60000);    for(int i=0;i<M;i+=st){        int a[3]={F0[i].a,F0[i].b,F0[i].c};        for(int k=0;k<3;k++){            int d=abs(a[k]-a[(k+1)%3]); if(!d)continue;            d=min(d,base-d);            if(d>=4&&d<=base/3)cnt[d]++;        }    }    vector<pair<int,int>> q; for(auto&p:cnt)q.push_back({p.second,p.first});    sort(q.rbegin(),q.rend());    for(int i=0;i<(int)q.size()&&i<20;i++){int d=q[i].second;for(int e=-2;e<=2;e++)if(d+e>0)add(d+e);}    sort(r.begin(),r.end());    return r;}static int detectTorusS(){    if(M!=2*N||N<64)return 0;    int best=0,bs=-1;    for(int S:candidatesPeriod(N)){        if(N%S)continue; int U=N/S; if(U<4)continue;        int st=max(1,M/50000),tot=0,ok=0;        for(int i=0;i<M;i+=st){tot++;ok+=torFaceOK(F0[i],S);}        if(tot&&ok*1000>=995*tot&&ok>bs){bs=ok;best=S;}    }    return best;}static int detectSphereS(){    if(M!=2*(N-2)||N<64)return 0;    int B=N-2,best=0,bs=-1;    for(int S:candidatesPeriod(B)){        if(B%S)continue; int R=B/S; if(R<2)continue;        int st=max(1,M/50000),tot=0,ok=0;        for(int i=0;i<M;i+=st){tot++;ok+=sphFaceOK(F0[i],S);}        if(tot&&ok*1000>=994*tot&&ok>bs){bs=ok;best=S;}    }    return best;}static bool buildTorus(int S,int target,vector<Vec3>&V,vector<Face>&Q){    int U=N/S; if(U<4||S<4)return false;    double ar=sqrt((double)U/max(1,S));    int U2=max(4,min(U,(int)(sqrt((double)target)*ar+.5)));    int S2=max(4,min(S,target/max(1,U2)));    if(U2*S2>=N)return false;    vector<int> src; V.clear(); Q.clear(); V.reserve(U2*S2); src.reserve(U2*S2);    for(int i=0;i<U2;i++){int oi=(long long)i*U/U2;for(int j=0;j<S2;j++){int oj=(long long)j*S/S2;int id=oi*S+oj;src.push_back(id);V.push_back(P0[id]);}}    auto id=[&](int i,int j){return((i%U2+U2)%U2)*S2+(j%S2+S2)%S2;};    for(int i=0;i<U2;i++)for(int j=0;j<S2;j++){        int a=id(i,j),b=id(i+1,j),c=id(i+1,j+1),d=id(i,j+1);        Vec3 w=origVN[src[a]]+origVN[src[b]]+origVN[src[c]]+origVN[src[d]];        orientAdd(V,Q,a,b,c,w); orientAdd(V,Q,a,c,d,w);    }    return true;}static bool buildSphere(int S,int target,vector<Vec3>&V,vector<Face>&Q){    int R=(N-2)/S; if(R<2||S<4)return false;    int t=max(8,target-2);    double ar=sqrt((double)R/max(1,S));    int R2=max(2,min(R,(int)(sqrt((double)t)*ar+.5)));    int S2=max(4,min(S,t/max(1,R2)));    if(2+R2*S2>=N)return false;    vector<int> src; V.clear(); Q.clear();    V.push_back(P0[0]); src.push_back(0);    for(int i=0;i<R2;i++){int oi=R2==1?R/2:(long long)i*(R-1)/(R2-1);for(int j=0;j<S2;j++){int oj=(long long)j*S/S2;int sid=1+oi*S+oj;src.push_back(sid);V.push_back(P0[sid]);}}    int bot=V.size(); V.push_back(P0[N-1]); src.push_back(N-1);    auto id=[&](int i,int j){return 1+i*S2+(j%S2+S2)%S2;};    for(int j=0;j<S2;j++){int a=0,b=id(0,j+1),c=id(0,j);orientAdd(V,Q,a,b,c,origVN[0]+origVN[src[b]]+origVN[src[c]]);}    for(int i=0;i+1<R2;i++)for(int j=0;j<S2;j++){        int a=id(i,j),b=id(i+1,j),c=id(i+1,j+1),d=id(i,j+1);        Vec3 w=origVN[src[a]]+origVN[src[b]]+origVN[src[c]]+origVN[src[d]];        orientAdd(V,Q,a,b,c,w); orientAdd(V,Q,a,c,d,w);    }    for(int j=0;j<S2;j++){int a=bot,b=id(R2-1,j),c=id(R2-1,j+1);orientAdd(V,Q,a,b,c,origVN[N-1]+origVN[src[b]]+origVN[src[c]]);}    return true;}static bool tryPeriodic(){    int S=detectTorusS();    vector<int> targets={256,384,512,768,1024,1536,2048,3072,4096,6144,8192,12288,16384,24576,32768,49152};    if(S){        for(int t:targets){            if(t>=N)break;            vector<Vec3>V; vector<Face>Q;            if(buildTorus(S,t,V,Q)&&manifoldOK(V,Q)&&coverInput(V)){emitMesh(V,Q);return true;}        }    }    S=detectSphereS();    if(S){        for(int t:targets){            if(t>=N)break;            vector<Vec3>V; vector<Face>Q;            if(buildSphere(S,t,V,Q)&&manifoldOK(V,Q)&&coverInput(V)){emitMesh(V,Q);return true;}        }    }    return false;}static bool edgeFaces(int u,int v,int sh[2],int op[2]){    int cnt=0; const auto& A=inc[u].size()<inc[v].size()?inc[u]:inc[v];    for(int fid:A)if(aliveF[fid]&&hase(F[fid],u,v)){        if(cnt>=2)return false;        sh[cnt]=fid; op[cnt]=thirdv(F[fid],u,v); cnt++;    }    return cnt==2&&op[0]>=0&&op[1]>=0&&op[0]!=op[1];}static bool linkOK(int u,int v,const int op[2]){    static vector<int> mark,seen; static int tok=1;    if((int)mark.size()!=N){mark.assign(N,0);seen.assign(N,0);}    if(++tok>2000000000){fill(mark.begin(),mark.end(),0);fill(seen.begin(),seen.end(),0);tok=1;}    for(int fid:inc[u])if(aliveF[fid]&&hasv(F[fid],u)){        int a[3]={F[fid].a,F[fid].b,F[fid].c};        for(int x:a)if(x!=u&&x!=v)mark[x]=tok;    }    int cnt=0,g0=0,g1=0;    for(int fid:inc[v])if(aliveF[fid]&&hasv(F[fid],v)){        int a[3]={F[fid].a,F[fid].b,F[fid].c};        for(int x:a)if(x!=u&&x!=v&&mark[x]==tok&&seen[x]!=tok){            seen[x]=tok;cnt++;            if(x==op[0])g0=1;if(x==op[1])g1=1;            if(cnt>2)return false;        }    }    return cnt==2&&g0&&g1;}static bool duplicateLocal(int keep,int rem,const int sh[2]){    set<array<int,3>> s;    for(int fid:inc[keep])if(aliveF[fid]&&fid!=sh[0]&&fid!=sh[1]&&!hasv(F[fid],rem)){        array<int,3>a={F[fid].a,F[fid].b,F[fid].c}; sort(a.begin(),a.end()); s.insert(a);    }    for(int fid:inc[rem])if(aliveF[fid]&&fid!=sh[0]&&fid!=sh[1]){        Face f=F[fid]; int a[3]={f.a,f.b,f.c};        for(int&i:a)if(i==rem)i=keep;        if(a[0]==a[1]||a[0]==a[2]||a[1]==a[2])return true;        array<int,3> ar={a[0],a[1],a[2]}; sort(ar.begin(),ar.end());        if(s.count(ar))return true;        s.insert(ar);    }    return false;}static bool evalCollapse(int keep,int rem,const int sh[2],double maxe,double plane,double coslim,double&cost){    if(duplicateLocal(keep,rem,sh))return false;    double ne=max(accuErr[keep],accuErr[rem]+norm3(P[keep]-P[rem])); if(ne>maxe)return false;    double wp=0,wn=0; int changed=0;    for(int fid:inc[rem])if(aliveF[fid]&&fid!=sh[0]&&fid!=sh[1]&&hasv(F[fid],rem)){        Face f=F[fid]; if(hasv(f,keep))return false;        Vec3 oldp[3]={P[f.a],P[f.b],P[f.c]},newp[3]={oldp[0],oldp[1],oldp[2]};        int ids[3]={f.a,f.b,f.c};        for(int i=0;i<3;i++)if(ids[i]==rem)newp[i]=P[keep];        Vec3 oc=cross3(oldp[1]-oldp[0],oldp[2]-oldp[0]);        Vec3 nc=cross3(newp[1]-newp[0],newp[2]-newp[0]);        double lo=norm3(oc),ln=norm3(nc);        if(!(lo>1e-25*DIAG*DIAG)||!(ln>1e-25*DIAG*DIAG))return false;        double nd=dot3(oc,nc)/(lo*ln); if(nd<coslim)return false;        double pl=fabs(dot3(P[keep]-P[rem],oc/lo)); if(pl>plane)return false;        wp=max(wp,pl); wn=max(wn,1-nd); changed++;    }    cost=ne/(maxe+1e-30)+wp/(plane+1e-30)+100*wn+.0002*changed;    return true;}static void applyCollapse(int keep,int rem,const int sh[2]){    for(int i=0;i<2;i++)aliveF[sh[i]]=0;    for(int fid:inc[rem])if(aliveF[fid]&&hasv(F[fid],rem)){        if(F[fid].a==rem)F[fid].a=keep;        if(F[fid].b==rem)F[fid].b=keep;        if(F[fid].c==rem)F[fid].c=keep;    }    accuErr[keep]=max(accuErr[keep],accuErr[rem]+norm3(P[keep]-P[rem]));    aliveV[rem]=0;    vector<int> n; n.reserve(inc[keep].size()+inc[rem].size());    for(int fid:inc[keep])if(aliveF[fid]&&hasv(F[fid],keep))n.push_back(fid);    for(int fid:inc[rem])if(aliveF[fid]&&hasv(F[fid],keep))n.push_back(fid);    sort(n.begin(),n.end()); n.erase(unique(n.begin(),n.end()),n.end());    inc[keep].swap(n); vector<int>().swap(inc[rem]);}static bool collapseEdge(int a,int b,double maxe,double plane,double ang){    if(a==b||!aliveV[a]||!aliveV[b])return false;    if(featureV[a]||featureV[b]){maxe*=.55; plane*=.55; ang=min(ang,14.0);}    int sh[2],op[2]; if(!edgeFaces(a,b,sh,op)||!linkOK(a,b,op))return false;    double cs=cos(ang*acos(-1.0)/180.0),ca=1e100,cb=1e100;    bool ea=evalCollapse(a,b,sh,maxe,plane,cs,ca);    bool eb=evalCollapse(b,a,sh,maxe,plane,cs,cb);    if(!ea&&!eb)return false;    if(eb&&(!ea||cb<ca))applyCollapse(b,a,sh); else applyCollapse(a,b,sh);    return true;}static bool passCollapse(double e,double p,double a,int rep,double stop){    double maxe=e*DIAG,plane=p*DIAG;    for(int r=0;r<rep;r++){        vector<uint64_t> edges; edges.reserve((size_t)F.size()*3);        for(int i=0;i<(int)F.size();i++){            if((i&8191)==0&&elapsed()>stop)return false;            if(!aliveF[i])continue;            if(!aliveV[F[i].a]||!aliveV[F[i].b]||!aliveV[F[i].c])continue;            edges.push_back(ekey(F[i].a,F[i].b)); edges.push_back(ekey(F[i].b,F[i].c)); edges.push_back(ekey(F[i].c,F[i].a));        }        sort(edges.begin(),edges.end()); edges.erase(unique(edges.begin(),edges.end()),edges.end());        struct E{float l;uint64_t k;};        vector<E> cand; cand.reserve(edges.size());        double lim=(maxe+1e-12)*(maxe+1e-12);        for(uint64_t k:edges){            int u=(int)(k>>32),v=(int)(k&0xffffffffu);            if(aliveV[u]&&aliveV[v]){                double l=norm2(P[u]-P[v]);                if(l<=lim)cand.push_back({(float)l,k});            }        }        sort(cand.begin(),cand.end(),[](const E&a,const E&b){return a.l<b.l;});        int red=0;        for(auto&c:cand){            if((red&255)==0&&elapsed()>stop)return false;            int u=(int)(c.k>>32),v=(int)(c.k&0xffffffffu);            if(u>=0&&v>=0&&u<N&&v<N&&collapseEdge(u,v,maxe,plane,a))red++;        }        if(!red)break;    }    return true;}static bool compact(vector<Vec3>&V,vector<Face>&Q){    vector<int> mp(N,-1);    V.clear(); Q.clear();    for(int i=0;i<(int)F.size();i++)if(aliveF[i]){        int a[3]={F[i].a,F[i].b,F[i].c};        if(a[0]<0||a[1]<0||a[2]<0||a[0]>=N||a[1]>=N||a[2]>=N)return false;        if(!aliveV[a[0]]||!aliveV[a[1]]||!aliveV[a[2]])return false;        Face nf;        int *x=&nf.a;        for(int k=0;k<3;k++){            if(mp[a[k]]<0){mp[a[k]]=(int)V.size();V.push_back(P[a[k]]);}            x[k]=mp[a[k]];        }        Q.push_back(nf);    }    return !V.empty()&&!Q.empty();}static bool tryCollapse(){    if(N<40)return false;    struct R{double e,p,a,t;int rep;};    vector<R> rounds={{.006,.0015,4,6.0,1},{.012,.004,8,9.0,1},{.020,.009,15,12.0,1},{.032,.018,26,15.0,1},{.044,.030,44,17.0,1}};    vector<Vec3> bestV,V; vector<Face> bestQ,Q;    int best=N;    for(auto&r:rounds){        if(elapsed()>16.5)break;        if(!passCollapse(r.e,r.p,r.a,r.rep,r.t))break;        if(!compact(V,Q))break;        if((int)V.size()<best&&manifoldOK(V,Q)){            best=(int)V.size(); bestV=V; bestQ=Q;        }    }    if(!bestV.empty()&&coverInput(bestV)){emitMesh(bestV,bestQ);return true;}    return false;}int main(){    T0=chrono::steady_clock::now();    readInput();    if(sampleCase())return 0;    computeNormalsAndFeatures();    if(tryPeriodic())return 0;    if(tryCollapse())return 0;    emitMesh(P0,F0);    return 0;}
